case_payload.summary: Observable outcome is already visible (chronic burnout after months of overload). System starts from ReverseTrace → LikelySplitPoint (overload pattern started 4 months ago) instead of building long event history forward.
case_payload.claim_attempt: With visible burnout outcome, system applies reverse-first parsing: ReverseTrace identifies overload pattern, SplitPoint locates critical transition 4 months ago.

why: The system correctly prioritizes ReverseTrace when the outcome is already observable.
SplitPoint accurately identifies the critical transition point in the past.
This behavior aligns with the looking-glass mode's focus on understanding root causes from known outcomes.
